--- a/packages/desktop/src/main/constants.ts
+++ b/packages/desktop/src/main/constants.ts
@@ -1,11 +1,18 @@
 import { app } from "electron"
+import { IPC } from "./ipc-channels"
 
-type Channel = "dev" | "beta" | "prod"
+export type Channel = "dev" | "beta" | "prod"
 const raw = import.meta.env.OPENCODE_CHANNEL
 export const CHANNEL: Channel = raw === "dev" || raw === "beta" || raw === "prod" ? raw : "dev"
 
-export const SETTINGS_STORE = "opencode.settings"
+export const SETTINGS_STORE = IPC.store.SETTINGS
 export const DEFAULT_SERVER_URL_KEY = "defaultServerUrl"
 export const WSL_ENABLED_KEY = "wslEnabled"
 export const PINCH_ZOOM_ENABLED_KEY = "pinchZoomEnabled"
 export const UPDATER_ENABLED = app.isPackaged && CHANNEL !== "dev"
+

@@ -43,8 +44,7 @@ export function wslPath(path: string, mode: "windows" | "linux" | null): string
